transcripts.title: V14 — Capability Dispatch
transcripts.description: Verify capability dispatch with different petting responses per animal

commands.output:
Family Zoo
By Sharpee Tutorial

Type HELP for instructions.

Main Path

A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo. Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside the path. To the east, the petting zoo. To the west, the aviary. A staff gate blocks the path to the south. The entrance is back to the north.

You can see staff gate, direction signs, flower beds, souvenir penny, park bench, lunchbox, zookeeper here.

Petting Zoo

A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals. Pygmy goats trot around nibbling at visitors' shoelaces, while a pair of fluffy rabbits hop lazily near a hay bale. A feed dispenser is mounted on a post. An info plaque is posted by the gate. The main path is back to the west.

You can see hay bale, info plaque, pygmy goats, rabbits, bag of animal feed, feed dispenser here.
commands.comment: V14 teaches: Capability dispatch — same verb, different behavior per entity

commands.output: You reach down and pet the nearest goat. It leans into your hand and bleats happily. The others crowd around, demanding equal attention.
You gently stroke one of the rabbits. Its fur is incredibly soft. It twitches its nose at you contentedly.
commands.comment: Pet the rabbits — soft and fuzzy
Try to pet the hay bale — blocked (no PettableTrait)

commands.output:
Main Path

A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo. Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside the path. To the east, the petting zoo. To the west, the aviary. A staff gate blocks the path to the south. The entrance is back to the north.

You can see staff gate, direction signs, flower beds, souvenir penny, park bench, lunchbox here.
commands.comment: Go to aviary and pet the parrot — it bites!

commands.output:
Aviary

You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch overhead. A small waterfall splashes into a stone basin. An info plaque hangs near the entrance. The gift shop is to the west. The main path is back to the east.

You can see toucan, waterfall, rope perches, aviary plaque, parrots, parrot here.
You reach toward the parrot. CHOMP! It nips your finger with its beak. "NO TOUCHING!" it squawks indignantly.
